query: how much did we spend this year?
expected_behavior: Loads oracle-fusion-procurement with oracle-fusion-overview as parent
Surfaces the spend-definition ambiguity BEFORE answering: ordered (PO amount) vs received (QUANTITY_RECEIVED) vs invoiced (QUANTITY_BILLED)
Surfaces the scope question: which business unit(s) / ledger, since _ALL tables are multi-org
Notes canceled/closed POs are excluded and asks which date basis applies
Does NOT silently pick a spend basis and return one number
anti_behavior: Does NOT produce an unscoped multi-org sum across all business units
Does NOT silently default to one of ordered/received/invoiced
